content.en:
"Succeeded, finally practiced the Infinite Body!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

The superior immeasurable body is far from being comparable to the inferior immeasurable body, not to mention those primary-level immeasurable life forms that don't even have the secret technique of the immeasurable body, and they are far inferior to Ye Tian.

Subsequently, Ye Tian was ready to test his combat power.

However, at his level, it is not easy to find a primary-level immeasurable lifeform comparable to his own strength, if he is too weak, there is no need to test his combat power.

The Nine Xuan Dao Ancestor of the Nine Layers Building might be able to fight him for a move or two, but the Nine Xuan Dao Ancestor was still in retreat, so he wouldn't bother the Nine Xuan Dao Ancestor.

"Buy a piece of the Infinite Mystery Wall!"

Ye Tian had such an idea.

The Infinite Mystery Wall is a magical treasure in the Xuanqi Realm, which is made of Infinite Stone, and this treasure can absorb power to present a specific standard of combat power.

Even a mid-level immeasurable lifeform can't destroy the immeasurable wall.

Because the immeasurable stone is very rare, the value of the immeasurable stone is very high.

However, Ye Tian was rich in wealth, and it was a big deal to sell a few more Shadowless Crystals, so he bought a piece of Infinite Xuanbi from the True Mountain City of the True Mountain Leader.

Subsequently, he brought this immeasurable wall into the interior of a plane where he lived, suppressing the entire time and space.

"The Infinite Xuanbi divides the attack power of the Infinite Lifeform into standards, the pure basic attack power of the weakest Infinite Lifeform is 1 point of the Infinite Scale, and when you cultivate to the limit of the Beginner Infinite Life Body, the basic attack power will be increased to 2 points at most. "

Ye Tian immediately tested it.

He didn't use any immeasurable control skills, nor did he urge the infinite body, but only attacked the immeasurable Xuanbi with his pure basic attack power.

Rumble!!!!!

The attack that could have shattered the Endless Space-Time and Endless Territory fell on the Infinite Mysterious Wall, but it was actually absorbed by the small Infinite Mysterious Cliff, causing only a slight concussion.

I saw a flash of immeasurable Xuanbi light, and a number appeared on it—1.8!

This means that Ye Tian's basic attack power has reached 1.8 scale, which is already a very high attack power, after all, Ye Tiancai has not long broken through to a primary-level immeasurable lifeform, and his cultivation is far from reaching the limit of a primary-level immeasurable lifeform!

"Try the immeasurable mastery technique that urges the Great Perfection level - the Endless Golden Spear!"

Ye Tian condensed the Endless Golden Spear and stabbed it fiercely at the Infinite Mystery Wall.

Airplanes!

A number emerged.

“90！"

This means that the amplification effect of the Great Perfection Infinite Mastery Skill is 50 times, directly causing his attack power to reach 90 scales.

After all, his own strength was already extremely strong, and it was quite good that the Great Perfection-level Immeasurable Control Technique could have such an increase.

Subsequently, he opened the other immeasurable control techniques one by one, the limit of the consummation-level immeasurable path was opened, and the treasures on his body were also opened one by one.

At this time, he once again used the Endless Golden Spear to poke at the immeasurable Xuanbi.

Airplanes!!!

Another number has emerged.

“120！"

This number is a bit higher than the number just now, but the increase is not large, and it is obvious that the attack has reached this level, and the amplification effect of many things is not good.

"If my Infinite Dao can be raised to the extreme realm, and then I can master the Peerless Infinite Dao Control Technique, then the attack level will definitely skyrocket!"

Ye Tian muttered.

According to his investigation, the attacks of those top-level primary-level immeasurable lifeform Great Ancestors were only more than a hundred, and some of them could reach an attack power of more than 200 scales.

The worst mid-tier primary-level immeasurable lifeforms can exert an attack power of 500 scales, and the slightly more powerful mid-level immeasurable lifeforms have an attack power of more than 1,000 scales.

"Try my Infinite Body!"

Ye Tianxian did not use the Endless Golden Spear, an immeasurable dao control technique, and only used his basic combat power to cooperate with the infinite power to attack.

Rumble!!!!

A number emerged.

“360！"

This is a full 360 scale of attack power, and his base power is only 1.8 scales, which means that his base power has increased by 200 times.

Subsequently, he unleashed his Infinite Body, used other means, and then unleashed the Endless Golden Spear.

In an instant, a number appeared above the immeasurable Xuanbi - 2400!

"This time, I only increased my combat power from 120 to 2400, which is only a 20-fold increase!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The higher the attack power, the smaller the multiplier will be.

If he increased by 200 times on the basis of his original peak combat power, it would be abnormal!

The combination of different means will have different multiples.

However, his strongest attack power now is 2400 scales, which has already surpassed the standard of 500 scales for the worst mid-level immeasurable lifeforms, which is comparable to ordinary middle-level immeasurable lifeforms.

Moreover, he still has room for improvement at the level of the primary immeasurable lifeform, and when his cultivation is improved, his basic combat power can also be improved.

If there is a breakthrough in the Infinite Dao, there will be an even greater breakthrough in strength!

"Although it is only a test of attack power, it also shows that my current strength has surpassed those weaker mid-level immeasurable lifeforms!"

Ye Tian thought excitedly.

With his current strength, he is almost invincible in the Silent Black Sea!

However, if he is placed in the Xuanqi Territory, his strength is not worth mentioning.

For example, those middle-level immeasurable lifeforms who have cultivated the Infinite Body Secret Technique, any of them can crush him casually, and he is not qualified to be arrogant.

In the following days, Ye Tian began to use the ability to fuse all things to synthesize precious materials, trading resources from other Great Ancestors that could improve his own cultivation and improve his life level.

With his current strength, he is not worried that the Great Ancestor will dare to covet him.

As a result, he collected a lot of resources in a short period of time.

Although no Great Ancestor was willing to trade those truly incomparably rare resources, relying on a large amount of resources, he could still quickly improve his cultivation and life level.

Gradually, Ye Tian's cultivation became higher and higher, and his basic combat power became stronger and stronger, causing his combat power to continue to soar wildly.

"I have to find a treasure place to practice the Immeasurable Dao, if I can cultivate the Immeasurable Dao to the limit as soon as possible, my strength will skyrocket!"

Ye Tian muttered.

And there is more than one such treasure land in the True Mountain Territory, but they are all occupied by powerful forces, and they will not be cultivated by other Great Ancestors.

Other than that.

These treasure lands are similar to those treasure lands in the Silent Black Sea, even if they are more advanced, but they are of average help to him now, what he needs are those top immeasurable path cultivation treasure lands.

And on this day, he really found out a little bit of information.
